title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 80.600 - No rights affected by disincorporation
text:
80.600.  No rights affected by disincorporation. — No dissolution of any corporation under this chapter shall invalidate or affect any right, forfeiture or penalty accruing to such corporation, or invalidate or affect any contract entered into or imposed upon such corporation.
(RSMo 1939 § 7298) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7147; 1919 § 8596; 1909 § 9484
